title: Banner entry
description: A single entry in state.json banners[]. Written by SYNTHESIZE to record overruled teammate recommendations.

artifact_path.description: Relative or absolute path to the artifact this banner is attached to.

banner_type.description: Discriminated type. pre-reconciliation-draft: later cross-check superseded this artifact. synthesis-deviation-backpointer: SYNTHESIZE weighed the recommendation differently.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this banner was added.

added_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the banner was written.

added_by.description: Role name or agent name that wrote the banner.
